title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine as the company enters its next growth phase in 2026. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Finout is a cloud cost management company trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, Elastic, and Lyft, with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York.
score_reason: Exceptional match - Head of RevOps role at a high-growth fintech company with proven $30M+ ARR scaling experience requirement aligns perfectly with Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS expertise and Salesforce/RevOps specialization. Location is ideal with Tel Aviv headquarters matching his preferred area.
ai_opener: Omri here - I've spent 15+ years scaling RevOps functions in B2B SaaS through exactly the growth phase Finout is entering in 2026. With deep Salesforce administration expertise and hands-on experience building operational infrastructure that supports GTM engines at scale, I'm impressed by Finout's trusted position with marquee customers like Wiz and Elastic. I'd like to explore how I can help architect the next evolution of your revenue operations as you accelerate growth.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, this role accelerates revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy, scalable territory design, and consultative partnership with business leaders. Responsibilities include conducting deep-dive research and data analysis, serving as a key partner for Sales and RevOps with dashboards and regional insights, redesigning territory models for global scalability, and partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort navigating ambiguity. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD. Gong builds revenue intelligence technology.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps core competencies—territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, data-driven GTM, and cross-functional leadership are directly in his wheelhouse. Gong's revenue intelligence platform and B2B SaaS context create strong cultural/technical fit; only minor gap is this role skews slightly more toward strategy/analytics than pure operations execution.
ai_opener: Omri here—15 years building GTM engines in B2B SaaS, and I've spent a lot of time solving exactly what your Territory Strategy & Operations role tackles: turning data into scalable seller productivity. I've followed Gong's evolution and the revenue intelligence space closely. Your focus on data-driven territory design and cross-functional partnership with Sales/Finance is exactly the kind of high-leverage work I thrive in.

title: Senior RevOps Processes Specialist
description: Leads sales process improvements, streamlines operations, and implements scalable solutions. Responsibilities include collaborating cross-functionally to improve integration between Salesforce and critical systems such as HubSpot, LeanData, and Vitally; monitoring process adoption, data compliance, and governance; documenting knowledge repositories for sales support; and maintaining data integrity within Salesforce. Reports to the Manager, Revenue Operations Processes & Policies. Remote is a fully distributed global employment platform helping businesses recruit, pay, and manage international teams, with all positions fully remote and async work culture.
score_reason: Strong technical fit with Salesforce/HubSpot integration expertise and RevOps process focus, but the role is specialist-level reporting to a manager rather than a leadership position that typically matches Omri's seniority. Good opportunity for someone seeking individual contributor impact at a growing SaaS platform.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across Remote's Senior RevOps Processes Specialist role and was impressed by your focus on Salesforce-HubSpot integration and data governance—areas where I've built enterprise-scale solutions across multiple B2B SaaS organizations. With 15+ years optimizing RevOps stacks and leading cross-functional implementations, I'd bring both the technical depth you need and strategic perspective to scale your processes alongside your global growth.

title: GTM RevOps Engineer
description: A software-engineering-minded role applying automation and AI to B2B sales workflows. Responsibilities include designing automated workflows across prospecting, lead enrichment, scoring, routing, and follow-up; building integrations across the GTM stack (HubSpot, sales engagement, Clay, ZoomInfo); and developing AI-powered workflows for BDRs and AEs. Reports to the Revenue Team Leader. Requires familiarity with no-code/low-code platforms (Make, n8n, Zapier, Workato), data enrichment tooling, B2B SaaS GTM motion understanding, and demonstrated comfort building with LLMs and AI APIs. Not a CRM admin role.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—AI-native GTM workflows, B2B SaaS expertise, and automation-first mindset align perfectly. The no-code/low-code platform requirement and engineering-oriented approach fit Omri's profile, though the role leans slightly more tactical/implementation than strategic leadership.
